creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
I'd rather not rename this port.

The external project this port supports has been actively migrating to a newer esp-idf; once that work is complete I will update this port to a newer version of the toolchain. Meanwhile I don't want to make changes that would orphan existing users of it.

Please propose a name for a v2022.01.29 version of a port and I'll work on adding it.
